fragment_2: How we turn ideas into reality.
fragment_3: Studio Moaré, our formula for the success of a web project: discover how we turn ideas into reality.
fragment_4: Discover how we turn ideas into reality.
fragment_5: Write to us if you have any questions, want information about our services, or just want to say hello
list_1: Analysis. You tell us your idea.
Proposal. We put together a quote based on what we discussed.
If you approve it, we create a staging environment so you can see and share the process at every step.
We implement the agreed features and the information architecture in the staging environment.
We create and implement a design proposal.
We import the content. This is usually a bulk import of text and images.
We review the screens agreed on in the quote. These are usually the most important screens, such as the home page or the about page, etc.
We create training videos explaining how your new site works. After watching them, you'll be able to manage all its content yourself.
We move the site to a production environment. We advise you on hiring a hosting provider.
We test everything, check that it all works, and register your site with different services and applications.
And if you'd like… we take care of your site's maintenance.
